calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ian Kelley, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Ramanbhai Patel, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Narendra Shah.
Amended Default entered on March 15, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed today, March 13, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:
Exhibit 1---Promissory Note dated 08/16/01----------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Ramanbhai Patel, and against the Defaulted Defendant Narendra Shah as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25.000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,500.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,750.00.
Costs $465.00, for a total of $39,715.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 was returned to counsel.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Continued To Apr-21-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Mathew E. Hersh, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 4/21/2008 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. (212)
